data.title: Nubank to integrate stablecoin for card payments; test soon. Adoption of stablecoins rises in Latin America.	neto6100
data.description: Roberto Campos Neto, Vice-Chairman of Nubank, announced plans for the bank to conduct trials on stablecoin credit card transactions. This decision comes amidst the rapid growth of stablecoin usage in Latin America.

data.title: Lennar Corp (NYSE: LEN) Q3 report disappoints: Adjusted EPS $2 (miss estimate $2.10), revenue $8.81B (miss $8.99B). Stock slides.
data.description: Lennar Corp. (NYSE: LEN) has published its Q3 results, revealing adjusted earnings of $2 per share, falling short of the expected $2.10. The quarterly revenue stood at $8.81 billion, missing the street estimate of $8.99 billion. LEN stock movements can be tracked in real-time following this report. Check out further analysis on Benzinga.com, where additional details are available regarding Lennar's performance and market response, including Quantum Stock Tracker updates such as IonQ's increased price targets, Rigetti's 30% climb, and Nvidia's latest quantum investments.

data.title: One Park Financial achieves Great Place to Work® Certification for the 8th time in Coconut Grove, celebrating the recognition.
data.description: For the eighth consecutive year, One Park Financial in Coconut Grove, Florida, has received certification as a Great Place to Work®. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment. The certification reflects high levels of employee satisfaction, with the company consistently meeting the criteria for the prestigious recognition. This marks another milestone in One Park Financial's ongoing dedication to creating a workplace where employees feel valued and supported.

data.title: Investor Alert: Faruqi & Faruqi investigates Lantheus claims. Losses over $75K advised contacting James Wilson. Act if applicable.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Lantheus to reach out to him for a consultation on potential courses of action. If your losses in Lantheus from February 26, 2025, to August 5, 2025, exceeded $75,000, contact James Wilson directly to explore your options.

data.title: Rithm Capital Corp. prices public offering of 7.6M shares of Preferred Stock at $25/share, raising $190M in gross proceeds.
data.description: In New York, Rithm Capital Corp. revealed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The company, trading under NYSE: RITM, priced 7,600,000 shares of its 8.75% Series E Fixed-Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. Each share of the Preferred Stock holds a liquidation preference of $25.00. The offering generated around $190,000,000 in gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discount and other anticipated offering expenses. Rithm plans to seek listing of the Preferred Stock on the stock exchange.

data.title: RioCan REIT plans $200M offering of Series AP Senior Unsecured Debentures, priced at 4.417% coupon, maturing in 2032. Repaying existing loans.
data.description: Toronto-based RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust, listed as REI.UN on the Toronto Stock Exchange, has revealed its plan to issue $200 million worth of Series AP senior unsecured debentures. Priced at $100 per $100 principal amount, the debentures will bear a 4.417% annual coupon and are set to mature on October 1, 2032. The proceeds generated from this issuance will primarily go towards repaying current debts held by the Trust.

data.title: Dow Jones futures rise after stock market reaches record highs; Palantir leads new buys with Spotify.
data.description: Following a successful Nvidia deal and a positive response from the Federal Reserve, the major stock indexes reached all-time highs. Palantir and Spotify were among the top companies experiencing new buying activity. Dow Jones Futures are up as the stock market continues its upward trend. Palantir stands out as a leader in the latest buying activity.

data.title: Completion of first community-funded home in Greenville, CA celebrated with ribbon-cutting ceremony on September 24, 2025.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Paradise Affordable Homes and RRA Builders celebrated the completion of the inaugural community-funded, single-family residence in Greenville, CA. The ribbon cutting ceremony and open house marked this milestone achievement. This initiative aimed to provide affordable housing solutions in the area.

data.title: Prime Mining receives favorable recommendation from Glass Lewis for plan of arrangement with Torex Gold; Securityholders reminded of voting deadline. TSX: PRYM, OTCQX: PRMNF, Frankfurt: O4V3.
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On September 18, 2025, Prime Mining Corp. ("Prime" or "the Company") (TSX: PRYM) (OTCQX: PRMNF) (Frankfurt: O4V3) shared that Glass Lewis, a reputable proxy advisory firm, endorsed the approval of the plan of arrangement (the "Arrangement") with Torex Gold Resources Inc. This recommendation is directed towards Prime Securityholders and advocates voting "FOR" the proposed agreement.
